# Azure Mastery

> Azure Mastery is an iOS and iPadOS app for Microsoft certification exam preparation (Azure, AI, Data, Security, and Power Platform). It uses on-device CoreML to predict your exam score (Exam IQ), build adaptive study plans, and track knowledge decay before exam day. 9,000+ practice questions cover 26 Microsoft certification exams. The app runs 100% offline with no tracking and no data collection.

Publisher: Moonbeam Alpha Ltd
Platform: iOS 17+, iPadOS 17+
Pricing: Free to download, with optional in-app purchases for full per-exam question banks. No subscription required for core study features.
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/azure-mastery/id6760594569

## Primary pages

- [Home — Azure Mastery](https://azuremastery.app/): Product overview, feature list, screenshots, and App Store link. Canonical entry point.
- [Support](https://azuremastery.app/apps/AzureMastery/support.html): User support, contact, and FAQ.
- [Privacy Policy](https://azuremastery.app/apps/AzureMastery/privacy.html): Data handling — none collected; everything runs on-device.
- [Terms of Use](https://azuremastery.app/apps/AzureMastery/terms.html): Standard EULA for in-app purchases.

## Per-exam landing pages

Every exam covered by the app has a dedicated landing page describing the exam, the in-app question count, the official Microsoft Learn skills outline, a suggested study plan, and cert-specific FAQs. Question counts are extracted directly from the app's bundled question banks. Each page ships a single `@graph` JSON-LD block linking 6 entities (WebPage, BreadcrumbList, EducationalOccupationalCredential, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, HowTo) for AI/AEO discoverability. The first 5 below are the most heavily-trafficked Azure exams and ship the deepest per-domain breakdowns.

### Azure infrastructure & solutions (7)

- [AZ-900 — Microsoft Azure Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-900/): 302 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains: cloud concepts (25–30%), Azure architecture and services (35–40%), Azure management and governance (30–35%). Skills outline updated 14 January 2026.

- [AZ-104 — Microsoft Azure Administrator](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-104/): 594 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier sysadmin cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions. Five domains: identities and governance (20–25%), storage (15–20%), compute (20–25%), virtual networking (15–20%), monitoring (10–15%). Skills outline updated 17 April 2026.

- [AZ-305 — Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-305/): 304 in-app practice questions. Expert-tier solution architect cert (single exam earns the Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert credential). Renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions plus case studies. Four design domains: identity/governance/monitoring (25–30%), data storage (20–25%), business continuity (15–20%), infrastructure (30–35%). Recommended Associate prerequisite: AZ-104. Skills outline updated 17 April 2026.

- [AZ-204 — Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-204/): 318 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier developer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions. **⚠ Exam retires 31 July 2026.** Five developer domains: compute (25–30%), storage (15–20%), security (15–20%), monitor/troubleshoot/optimize (5–10%), connect/consume services (20–25%). Heavy on SDK code samples in C#/Python/JavaScript. Skills outline updated 14 January 2026.

- [AZ-400 — Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-400/): 444 in-app practice questions (largest single-cert bank). Expert-tier DevOps cert (single exam earns the Microsoft Certified: DevOps Engineer Expert credential). Renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions. Five DevOps domains: process/communications (10–15%), source control (10–15%), build/release pipelines (50–55%), security/compliance (10–15%), instrumentation (5–10%). Required Associate prerequisite: AZ-104 OR AZ-204. Skills outline updated 24 April 2026.

- [AZ-500 — Microsoft Azure Security Engineer](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-500/): 326 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier security engineer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates managing identity and access (Entra, conditional access, PIM), securing networking (NSGs, Azure Firewall, Private Link, DDoS), securing compute/storage/databases, and managing security operations (Defender for Cloud, Sentinel, Key Vault). Skills outline updated 22 January 2026.

- [AZ-700 — Designing and Implementing Microsoft Azure Networking Solutions](https://azuremastery.app/exams/az-700/): 383 in-app practice questions. Specialty-tier network engineer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates designing/implementing core networking (VNets, peering, hybrid), private access (Private Link, ExpressRoute, VPN), routing and load balancing (Application Gateway, Load Balancer, Front Door, Traffic Manager), and securing/monitoring networks. Skills outline updated 24 April 2026.

### AI, Machine Learning & Copilot Agents (10)

- [AI-900 — Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-900/): 316 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates AI workloads and considerations, fundamentals of ML, computer vision, natural language processing, and generative AI on Azure. Skills outline updated 2 May 2025.

- [AI-901 — Microsoft Azure AI Foundations](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-901/): 319 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. The agentic-AI-focused fundamentals counterpart to AI-900, covering generative AI primitives, prompts, RAG concepts, and responsible AI for agent builders. Skills outline updated March 2026.

- [AI-102 — Designing and Implementing a Microsoft Azure AI Solution](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-102/): 334 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier AI engineer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates building Azure AI Service solutions, planning and managing AI solutions, computer vision, natural language processing, knowledge mining, document intelligence, and **implementing agentic solutions** (added December 2025). Skills outline updated 23 December 2025.

- [AI-103 — Microsoft AI App and Agent Developer](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-103/): 320 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier AI app and agent developer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates designing AI-enabled apps and agents, integrating Azure OpenAI Service, building with Microsoft Agent Framework, and shipping production agents with telemetry and governance. Skills outline updated 1 June 2026.

- [AI-200 — Microsoft Azure AI Cloud Developer](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-200/): 310 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier AI cloud developer cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates designing cloud-native AI applications, embedding LLMs into Azure-hosted apps, integrating with Azure AI Search and storage, and operationalising AI workloads. Skills outline updated March 2026.

- [AI-300 — Microsoft Azure ML Operations Engineer](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ai-300/): 320 in-app practice questions (covers the ML Operations Engineer role). Associate-tier cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates managing the ML lifecycle on Azure ML — model training pipelines, registries, deployment to managed and Kubernetes endpoints, monitoring drift, and responsible-AI evaluation in production. Skills outline updated March 2026.

- [AB-620 — Microsoft AI Agent Builder Associate](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ab-620/): 315 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier maker cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates building low-code agents in Microsoft Copilot Studio — topics, generative answers, knowledge sources, custom connectors, channel deployment, and Microsoft 365 Copilot extensibility (declarative agents, plug-ins). Skills outline updated March 2026.

- [AB-731 — Microsoft AI Transformation Leader](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ab-731/): 302 in-app practice questions. Beginner-tier leadership cert (no-code), does not expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration (65-min seat), 30–40 mixed-format questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains: identify the business value of generative AI solutions (35–40%), identify benefits/capabilities of Microsoft's AI apps and services (35–40%), identify an implementation and adoption strategy (20–25%). For business decision-makers, programme leads, and AI champions — not builders. Skills outline 2026.

- [AB-900 — Microsoft 365 Copilot and Agent Administration Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ab-900/): 324 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 35–45 mixed-format questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains: identify core features/objects of Microsoft 365 (30–35%), data protection and governance for M365 and Copilot (35–40%), basic admin tasks for Copilot and agents (25–30%). For IT admins deploying and governing Copilot. Skills outline published May 2026.

- [AB-100 — Microsoft Agentic AI Business Solutions Architect](https://azuremastery.app/exams/ab-100/): 342 in-app practice questions. Expert-tier architect cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 mixed-format questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates architecting multi-agent enterprise solutions with the Microsoft 365 Copilot extensibility framework, Microsoft Agent Framework, MCP extensibility, Computer Use, agent feed, and DSPM for AI. Skills outline published May 2026.

### Data (4)

- [DP-900 — Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-900/): 324 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates core data concepts (relational vs non-relational, OLTP vs OLAP), relational data on Azure (Azure SQL family), non-relational data on Azure (Cosmos DB, blob/file/table), and analytics workloads (Synapse, Microsoft Fabric, Power BI fundamentals). Skills outline updated 1 November 2024.

- [DP-100 — Designing and Implementing a Data Science Solution on Azure](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-100/): 350 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier data scientist cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Five domains including the new **Optimize language models for AI applications** (25–30%) added April 2025 — covers Azure ML workspace design, data preparation, model training (including responsible AI), deployment to managed/Kubernetes endpoints, and LLM optimisation (fine-tuning, prompt flow, RAG evaluation). Skills outline updated 11 April 2025.

- [DP-300 — Administering Microsoft Azure SQL Solutions](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-300/): 350 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier database administrator cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Five domains: plan/implement data platform resources (15–20%), implement secure environment (20–25%), monitor/configure/optimize (20–25%), automation (15–20%), HA/DR (20–25%). Skills outline updated 24 April 2026.

- [DP-800 — Microsoft Certified: SQL AI Developer Associate](https://azuremastery.app/exams/dp-800/): 312 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier SQL developer cert focused on AI-enabled SQL workloads (exam title: "Developing AI-Enabled Database Solutions"), renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration (120-min seat), 40–60 mixed-format questions, pass score 700/1000. Three domains: design and develop database solutions (35–40%) — advanced T-SQL, JSON, regex, fuzzy matching, graph queries, AI-assisted dev; secure/optimize/deploy (35–40%); implement AI capabilities in database solutions (25–30%) — embeddings, vector indexes, RAG with `sp_invoke_external_rest_endpoint`. Skills outline published 12 March 2026.

### Security, Compliance & Identity (4)

- [SC-900 — Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-900/): 322 in-app practice questions. Foundational exam, doesn't expire, USD $99 voucher. 45-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates security, compliance, and identity concepts; Microsoft Entra ID capabilities; Microsoft Defender XDR security solutions; and Microsoft Purview compliance solutions. Skills outline updated 7 November 2025.

- [SC-100 — Microsoft Cybersecurity Architect Expert](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-100/): 307 in-app practice questions. Expert-tier cybersecurity architect cert (single exam earns the credential, with prerequisite Associate cert). Renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 120-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates designing Zero Trust strategy and architecture, evaluating governance/risk/compliance technical strategies, designing security for infrastructure, and designing security for data and applications. Skills outline updated 27 April 2026.

- [SC-200 — Microsoft Security Operations Analyst](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-200/): 315 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier SOC analyst cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates mitigating threats with Microsoft Defender XDR (Defender for Endpoint, Office 365, Identity, Cloud Apps), mitigating threats with Microsoft Sentinel (KQL, analytics rules, watchlists, hunting), and managing security operations across the Microsoft security stack. Skills outline updated 16 April 2026.

- [SC-300 — Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator](https://azuremastery.app/exams/sc-300/): 311 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier identity admin cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates implementing identities in Microsoft Entra ID, implementing authentication and access management (conditional access, MFA, PIM, passwordless), implementing access management for apps, and planning/implementing identity governance. Skills outline updated 27 April 2026.

### Power Platform (1)

- [PL-300 — Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst](https://azuremastery.app/exams/pl-300/): 325 in-app practice questions. Associate-tier data analyst cert, renews annually, USD $165 voucher. 100-min duration, 40–60 questions, pass score 700/1000. Validates preparing data (Power Query M, data profiling), modelling data (star schemas, DAX measures, calculation groups, row-level security), visualising and analysing data (Power BI reports, dashboards, AI visuals), and deploying/maintaining assets (workspaces, deployment pipelines, refresh, sensitivity labels). Skills outline updated 24 April 2026.

## Exams covered (26)

The app covers the following Microsoft certification exams. All are taught with the same Exam IQ, adaptive study plan, exam simulator, and knowledge-decay engine.

### Azure infrastructure & solutions (7)
- AZ-900 — Microsoft Azure Fundamentals
- AZ-104 — Microsoft Azure Administrator Associate
- AZ-204 — Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure (Developer Associate)
- AZ-305 — Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions (Solutions Architect Expert)
- AZ-400 — Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions (DevOps Engineer Expert)
- AZ-500 — Microsoft Azure Security Technologies (Security Engineer Associate)
- AZ-700 — Designing and Implementing Microsoft Azure Networking Solutions

### AI, Machine Learning & Copilot Agents (10)
- AI-900 — Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals
- AI-901 — Microsoft Azure AI Foundations
- AI-102 — Designing and Implementing a Microsoft Azure AI Solution (AI Engineer Associate)
- AI-103 — Microsoft AI App and Agent Developer
- AI-200 — Microsoft Azure AI Cloud Developer
- AI-300 — Microsoft Azure ML Operations Engineer
- AB-620 — Microsoft AI Agent Builder Associate
- AB-731 — Microsoft AI Transformation Leader (no-code business leadership)
- AB-900 — Microsoft 365 Copilot and Agent Administration Fundamentals
- AB-100 — Microsoft Agentic AI Business Solutions Architect (Expert)

### Data (4)
- DP-900 — Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals
- DP-100 — Designing and Implementing a Data Science Solution on Azure (Data Scientist Associate)
- DP-300 — Administering Microsoft Azure SQL Solutions (Database Administrator Associate)
- DP-800 — Developing AI-Enabled Database Solutions (SQL AI Developer Associate)

### Security, Compliance & Identity (4)
- SC-900 — Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals
- SC-100 — Microsoft Cybersecurity Architect Expert
- SC-200 — Microsoft Security Operations Analyst
- SC-300 — Microsoft Identity and Access Administrator

### Power Platform (1)
- PL-300 — Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst Associate

## Core capabilities

- **Exam IQ**: On-device CoreML model that predicts your exam-day score with confidence intervals, using Item Response Theory (IRT) and Bayesian inference over your answer history.
- **Adaptive study plans**: The app picks your next session — weak-spot drills, knowledge-decay refreshes, mock exams — based on your current ability estimate per domain.
- **Exam simulator**: Full-length mock exams under real timing and question distribution for each Microsoft exam.
- **Knowledge decay tracking**: Spaced-repetition signals flag topics where your retention has dropped before exam day, with targeted refresher sessions.
- **Question types**: Multiple choice, multi-select, drag-and-drop ordering, hotspot, case studies — matching the formats Microsoft uses on the real exams.
- **Why Wrong**: For incorrect answers, on-device Apple Foundation Model generates targeted explanations grounded in the question's correct rationale.
- **Offline-first**: Works fully without a network. No telemetry, no analytics on user behavior, no account required.
- **Apple ecosystem**: Native SwiftUI on iPhone and iPad; Live Activities for active study sessions; Apple Watch glance for streaks and XP.

## Differentiation

Azure Mastery is built for serious certification candidates who want to know *when they're ready* rather than just drilling questions. It is differentiated from generic flashcard apps by:

1. ML score prediction calibrated to Microsoft's pass thresholds, not a raw % correct.
2. Per-domain ability estimation — you see exactly which of an exam's domains is dragging your predicted score down.
3. Knowledge decay alerts so you don't lose old material while learning new domains.
4. 100% on-device computation — Exam IQ, Why Wrong explanations, and study plan generation never leave the device.

## Social

- [TikTok — @azuremastery](https://www.tiktok.com/@azuremastery): Short-form video tips and exam study walkthroughs.
- [Facebook — Azure Mastery](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61578421530035): App announcements and community.
